title: BEM-888 integration selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

checks = []
def add(name, ok, detail):
    checks.append({'name':name,'ok':bool(ok),'detail':detail})

for p in ['governance/state/registry_schemas.json','governance/state/rule_registry.json','governance/state/message_envelope_schema.json','governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl','governance/state/workspace_promotion_policy.json','governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl','governance/state/product_repository_registry.json','governance/state/product_repository_registration_schema.json']:
    add('exists ' + p, Path(p).exists(), p)

try:
    schemas = json.loads(Path('governance/state/registry_schemas.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    add('registry schema count', len(schemas) >= 8, 'schemas=' + str(len(schemas)))
except Exception as e:
    add('registry schema parse', False, str(e))

try:
    rules = json.loads(Path('governance/state/rule_registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')).get('rules', [])
    add('rule count', len(rules) >= 12, 'rules=' + str(len(rules)))
    add('continuity rule exists', any(r.get('id') == 'RULE-012' for r in rules), 'RULE-012')
except Exception as e:
    add('rule registry parse', False, str(e))

try:
    msg_lines = Path('governance/messages/managed_channel_messages.jsonl').read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()
    add('message log nonempty', len(msg_lines) >= 2, 'messages=' + str(len(msg_lines)))
    parsed = [json.loads(x) for x in msg_lines]
    add('curator routing', all(str(m.get('source_curator','')).startswith('EL-CUR-') and str(m.get('target_curator','')).startswith('EL-CUR-') for m in parsed), 'curator-to-curator')
except Exception as e:
    add('message log parse', False, str(e))

try:
    promo = [json.loads(x) for x in Path('governance/workspaces/promotion_log.jsonl').read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()]
    add('workspace promotion has main', any(r.get('target_workspace') == 'main' and r.get('validation_status') == 'PASS' for r in promo), 'main PASS promotion')
except Exception as e:
    add('workspace promotion parse', False, str(e))

try:
    repo = json.loads(Path('governance/state/product_repository_registry.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    add('product registry has template', 'registration_template' in repo, 'registration_template')
    add('product registry has at least one candidate', len(repo.get('repositories', [])) >= 1, 'repositories=' + str(len(repo.get('repositories', []))))
except Exception as e:
    add('product registry parse', False, str(e))

try:
    backlog = json.loads(Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    done_ids = [i.get('id') for i in backlog.get('items', []) if i.get('status') == 'completed']
    add('backlog first five completed', all(x in done_ids for x in ['BEM-882-001','BEM-882-002','BEM-882-003','BEM-882-004','BEM-882-005']), ','.join(done_ids))
except Exception as e:
    add('backlog parse', False, str(e))

status = 'PASS' if all(c['ok'] for c in checks) else 'FAIL'
selftest = {'bem':'BEM-888','status':status,'checks':checks}
Path('governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.json').write_text(json.dumps(selftest, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

script = '''# BEM-888 integration selftest runner
import json
from pathlib import Path
report = json.loads(Path("governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
print(report["status"])
for check in report["checks"]:
    print(("PASS" if check["ok"] else "FAIL") + " | " + check["name"] + " | " + check["detail"])
raise SystemExit(0 if report["status"] == "PASS" else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/run_bem880_selftest.py').write_text(script, encoding='utf-8')

md = '# BEM-888 Integration selftest\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\n'
for c in checks:
    md += ('✅ ' if c['ok'] else '❌ ') + c['name'] + ' — ' + c['detail'] + '\n'
Path('governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-888 integration selftest proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nChecks: ' + str(len(checks)) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-882-006':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    b['status'] = 'completed' if all(i.get('status') == 'completed' for i in b.get('items', [])) else 'in_progress'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.json','governance/reports/BEM888_INTEGRATION_SELFTEST.md','governance/tools/run_bem880_selftest.py',str(marker),'governance/backlog/BEM882_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM888 integration selftest ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
